<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\VarExporter\Internal; /** * @author Nicolas Grekas <p@tchwork.com> * * @internal */ class NamedClosure { public function __construct( public readonly array $callable, public readonly ?\ReflectionMethod $method = null, ) { } }
